summary: Stunning performance of China Doll with dramatic Jerry solo and rich texture from Phil and Bob, captured on an uncharacterized but listenable recording
review: The reviewer raves about a superb rendition of "China Doll," highlighting a dramatic Jerry Garcia lead and added depth from Phil Lesh and Bob Weir. No specific comments on the source are given, but the five‑star rating implies the audio is at least clear enough to enjoy the musical nuances.

ai_rating.rationale: A single glowing 5‑star review praises both performance and overall listening experience; with no recording details, rating leans heavily on show quality while acknowledging limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about soundboard or audience source; absence of complaints suggests the recording is clear enough for enjoyment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not enough information to assess overall set pacing; focus is on the highlighted China Doll performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Dramatic solo noted as a highlight
band_member_comments.Phil: Adds a lot of texture to the performance
